git.last_commit: c42326e Complete phase 3 repair runtime evidence

stdout_tail: ok - default repair policy includes a block rule for out-of-scope writes
ok - default review policy maps check.l5 to block and check.l4 to require_approval
ok - getReviewBucketDefinition centralizes category and recommendation for each review bucket
ok - default review and repair packages expose structured package metadata
ok - resolveRulePolicy returns a policy snapshot id derived from the active package set
ok - resolveRulePolicy accepts extension packages and disabled rules in one active rule source
ok - evaluateRepairProposal flags patch writes outside the finding scope
ok - inspectProviderReadiness short-circuits to inline readiness when settings key exists
ok - inspectProviderReadiness reports missing in mock mode without secure store lookup
ok - runRepairPreflight blocks proposals that write outside the repair finding scope
ok - inspectLiveRepairReadiness blocks mock browser mode even when an inline key exists
ok - inspectLiveRepairReadiness allows tauri workspace mode when provider is ready
ok - inspectProviderReadiness uses secure store result when settings key is empty
ok - inspectProviderReadiness degrades to missing when secure store lookup fails
ok - applyRepairPlan refuses to write when required tests fail during preflight
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel parses model output into a structured proposal
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects operations outside the provided repair file set
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects no-op file rewrites
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that ignore critical finding files
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that only cover part of the high-severity file set
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that do not touch the high-severity finding line range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel accepts proposals that touch the high-severity finding line range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that only touch part of a multi-line high-severity range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects disjoint edits that only span across the risk range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects whitespace-only edits on the high-severity finding lines
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel accepts proposals that delete the high-severity finding line
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects comment-only edits when code on the high-severity line stays the same
ok - applyRepairPlan writes the proposal and rollbackRepairPlan restores the previous content
ok - applyRepairPlan rolls back already-written files when a later write fails
ok - applyRepairPlan reports rollback failures when cleanup cannot fully restore files
